content:
✨ hyperframes | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enable AI agents and developers to easily create and render video content using HTML and CSS, streamlining the video production workflow.
✨ Key Features: • HTML-based video rendering framework • Integration with AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) • Support for GSAP animations • AI agent skills for generating compositions and animations • CLI commands for rendering
📖 Summary: Hyperframes is an open-source video rendering framework that allows users to create video compositions using HTML and CSS. It integrates with AI agents to facilitate the creation process, enabling users to describe desired videos and have the AI generate the HTML/CSS code for rendering.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
